history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person stands in a grassy outdoor area, wearing a white t-shirt with "FAFIG STUDIO" written in yellow and black, along with a cartoonish graphic. They are also wearing very wide-leg light-wash jeans and white sneakers. The person is looking down, with their hands in their pockets. In the background, there are several black metal chairs, some white umbrella-like structures, trees, and a dark wooden box-like object on the ground. The lighting is soft and diffused, suggesting an overcast day or late afternoon. The overall color palette is muted, with dominant greens, grays, and whites, creating a relaxed and casual mood. The style is streetwear-inspired, with an emphasis on loose-fitting clothing.
